spring_web/web_ejem1/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13.
Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
spring_web/web_ejem1/pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to Java 21; keeping java.version at 17 would cause compilation errors or warnings if Java 21-specific features are used, or simply fail to enforce the target compatibility.
